---
title: "Advanced"
description: "Learning Path description"
author:
  - name: Author One
  - name: Author Two
date: "04/18/2026"
date-modified: now
order: 1
draft: true
image: "assets/img/thumbnail.png"
categories:
  - Learning Path

#     icon: file-zip
# resources:
#  - assets/project-template.zip
---
